docs.title: Solid3D Docs
docs.text: Solid3D is a C++ geometry kernel for 2D and 3D modeling. It supports both traditional B-Rep modeling and implicit modeling, and can be used as a native library on Windows, Linux, and macOS, or compiled to WebAssembly for web applications.

docs.title: Features
docs.text:
• B-Rep modeling — curves, surfaces, B-splines, contours, and related geometric algorithms in 2D and 3D
  • Implicit modeling — signed distance fields (SDF), primitives, boolean operations, lattices, and mesh tessellation
  • Cross-platform — Windows, Linux, and macOS
  • Web-ready — Emscripten / WASM build support

docs.title: Online debugger viewer
docs.text: Use the Solid3D Viewer in your browser to load, visualize, and debug models from the WASM build — no local setup required.

docs.title: ImplicitBox
docs.text: An axis-aligned implicit box (rectangular cuboid) defined by a center point and three half-dimensions.

docs.title: Create
docs.text:
static ResultStatusEnum Create(const Point3D& center,
                               const double   length,
                               const double   width,
                               const double   height,
                               ImplicitBox&   implicitBox);

docs.title: Parameters
docs.text: Name Direction Type Description center in Point3D Center point of the box. length in double Dimension along the X-axis. Must be > 0. width in double Dimension along the Y-axis. Must be > 0. height in double Dimension along the Z-axis. Must be > 0. implicitBox out ImplicitBox& The box object to initialize.

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
#include "Point3D.h"
#include "implicit_box.h"

S3D::ImplicitBox* box = S3D::ImplicitBox::New();
S3D::Point3D      center(0.0, 0.0, 0.0);
S3D::ImplicitBox::Create(center, 10.0, 5.0, 3.0, *box);

docs.title: ImplicitCircle
docs.text: An implicit circle defined by a center point, radius, and plane normal.

docs.title: Create
docs.text:
static ResultStatusEnum Create(const Point3D&     center,
                               const double       radius,
                               const Direction3D& normal,
                               ImplicitCircle&    circle);

docs.title: Parameters
docs.text: Name Direction Type Description center in Point3D Center point of the circle. radius in double Radius of the circle. Must be > 0. normal in Direction3D Normal direction of the circle plane. circle out ImplicitCircle& The circle object to initialize.

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
#include "Point3D.h"
#include "direction3d.h"
#include "implicit_circle.h"

S3D::ImplicitCircle* circle = S3D::ImplicitCircle::New();
S3D::Point3D           center(0.0, 0.0, 0.0);
S3D::Direction3D       normal = S3D::Direction3D::CreateZDir();
S3D::ImplicitCircle::Create(center, 5.0, normal, *circle);

docs.title: ImplicitCylinder
docs.text: An implicit cylinder defined by two axis endpoints and a radius.

docs.title: Create
docs.text:
static ResultStatusEnum Create(const Point3D&    point0,
                               const Point3D&    point1,
                               const double      radius,
                               ImplicitCylinder& implicitCylinder);

docs.title: Parameters
docs.text: Name Direction Type Description point0 in Point3D Start point of the cylinder axis. point1 in Point3D End point of the cylinder axis. radius in double Radius of the cylinder. Must be > 0. implicitCylinder out ImplicitCylinder& The cylinder object to initialize.

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
#include "Point3D.h"
#include "implicit_cylinder.h"

S3D::ImplicitCylinder* cylinder = S3D::ImplicitCylinder::New();
S3D::Point3D           point0(0.0, 0.0, 0.0);
S3D::Point3D           point1(0.0, 0.0, 4.0);
S3D::ImplicitCylinder::Create(point0, point1, 1.0, *cylinder);

docs.title: ImplicitRectangle
docs.text: An implicit rectangle profile defined on a plane, with optional rotation and corner fillet radius.

docs.title: Create
docs.text:
static ResultStatusEnum Create(const Axis3D&      plane,
                               const double       length,
                               const double       width,
                               const double       angle,
                               const double       cornerRadius,
                               ImplicitRectangle& rectangle);

docs.title: Parameters
docs.text: Name Direction Type Description plane in Axis3D Plane frame of the rectangle. length in double Length along the plane reference axis. Must be > 0. width in double Width along the plane tangent axis. Must be > 0. angle in double Rotation angle of the rectangle in the plane. cornerRadius in double Corner fillet radius. Must be >= 0. rectangle out ImplicitRectangle& The rectangle object to initialize.

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
#include "axis3d.h"
#include "implicit_rectangle.h"

#define _USE_MATH_DEFINES
#include <math.h>

S3D::ImplicitRectangle* rectangle = S3D::ImplicitRectangle::New();
S3D::Axis3D             axis;
S3D::ImplicitRectangle::Create(axis, 1.0, 2.0, M_PI / 6.0, 0.3, *rectangle);

docs.title: ImplicitRegularPolygon
docs.text: An implicit regular polygon profile defined on a plane.

docs.title: Create
docs.text:
static ResultStatusEnum Create(const Axis3D&           plane,
                               const double            radius,
                               const bool              isInscribed,
                               const size_t            nbSides,
                               ImplicitRegularPolygon& polygon);

docs.title: Parameters
docs.text: Name Direction Type Description plane in Axis3D Plane frame of the polygon. radius in double Reference circle radius. Must be > 0. isInscribed in bool If true, vertices lie on the circle; if false, edge midpoints are tangent. nbSides in size_t Number of polygon sides. Must be >= 3. polygon out ImplicitRegularPolygon& The polygon object to initialize.

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
#include "axis3d.h"
#include "implicit_regular_polygon.h"

S3D::ImplicitRegularPolygon* polygon = S3D::ImplicitRegularPolygon::New();
S3D::Axis3D                  axis;
S3D::ImplicitRegularPolygon::Create(axis, 3.0, true, 5, *polygon);

docs.title: ImplicitSphere
docs.text: An implicit sphere defined by a center point and radius.

docs.title: Create
docs.text:
static ResultStatusEnum Create(const Point3D&  center,
                               const double    radius,
                               ImplicitSphere& implicitSphere);

docs.title: Parameters
docs.text: Name Direction Type Description center in Point3D Center point of the sphere. radius in double Radius of the sphere. Must be > 0. implicitSphere out ImplicitSphere& The sphere object to initialize.

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
#include "Point3D.h"
#include "implicit_sphere.h"

S3D::ImplicitSphere* sphere = S3D::ImplicitSphere::New();
S3D::Point3D           center(0.0, 0.0, 0.0);
S3D::ImplicitSphere::Create(center, 2.0, *sphere);

docs.title: ImplicitCylVolLattice
docs.text: A cylindrical volume lattice that tiles a unit cell periodically in radial, angular, and axial directions within a bounding volume. The lattice is clipped to the shape of the volume body.

docs.title: Create
docs.text:
static ResultStatusEnum Create(ImplicitBody*          myVolume,
                               ImplicitUnitCells*     myUnitCell,
                               const double           cellRadius,
                               const double           cellHeight,
                               const size_t           arcCount,
                               const double           thickness,
                               const Axis3D&          frame,
                               ImplicitCylVolLattice& implicitCylVolLattice);

docs.title: Parameters
docs.text: Name Direction Type Description myVolume in ImplicitBody* Bounding volume. The lattice is clipped to this shape. Must not be nullptr. myUnitCell in ImplicitUnitCells* Unit cell defining the repeating pattern (e.g. ImplicitTPMSUnitCell). Must not be nullptr. cellRadius in double Physical size of one cell period in the radial direction. Must be > 0. cellHeight in double Physical size of one cell period along the cylinder axis. Must be > 0. arcCount in size_t Number of unit cells around one full revolution (angular tiling count). thickness in double Wall thickness of the lattice struts. frame in Axis3D Cylindrical coordinate frame. implicitCylVolLattice out ImplicitCylVolLattice& The lattice object to initialize.

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
#include "axis3d.h"
#include "implicit_cyl_vol_lattice.h"
#include "implicit_cylinder.h"
#include "implicit_tpms_unit_cell.h"

using namespace S3D;

ImplicitCylinder* cylinder = ImplicitCylinder::New();
ImplicitCylinder::Create(Point3D(0.0, 0.0, 0.0), Point3D(0.0, 0.0, 0.1), 0.05, *cylinder);

ImplicitTPMSUnitCell* tpms = ImplicitTPMSUnitCell::New();
ImplicitTPMSUnitCell::Create(TPMSTypeEnum::Gyroid, 0.0, PermutationEnum::XYZ, *tpms);

Axis3D frame;
ImplicitCylVolLattice* lattice = ImplicitCylVolLattice::New();
ImplicitCylVolLattice::Create(cylinder, tpms, 0.025, 0.025, 10, 0.005, frame, *lattice);

docs.title: ImplicitRectVolLattice
docs.text: A rectangular (Cartesian) volume lattice that tiles a unit cell periodically along three orthogonal axes within a bounding volume. The lattice is clipped to the shape of the volume body, and each period of the unit cell is scaled to the specified cell size.

docs.title: Create
docs.text:
static ResultStatusEnum Create(ImplicitBody*           myVolume,
                               ImplicitUnitCells*      myUnitCell,
                               const Vector3D&         unitCellSize,
                               const Axis3D&           frame,
                               const double            thickness,
                               ImplicitRectVolLattice& implicitRectVolLattice);

docs.title: Parameters
docs.text: Name Direction Type Description myVolume in ImplicitBody* Bounding volume. The lattice is clipped to this shape. Must not be nullptr. myUnitCell in ImplicitUnitCells* Unit cell defining the repeating pattern (e.g. ImplicitTPMSUnitCell). Must not be nullptr. unitCellSize in Vector3D Physical size of one cell period along X, Y, Z axes of the frame. All components must be > 0. frame in Axis3D Lattice coordinate frame. thickness in double Wall thickness of the lattice struts. implicitRectVolLattice out ImplicitRectVolLattice& The lattice object to initialize.

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
#include "axis3d.h"
#include "implicit_box.h"
#include "implicit_rect_vol_lattice.h"
#include "implicit_tpms_unit_cell.h"

using namespace S3D;
ImplicitBox* box = ImplicitBox::New();
ImplicitBox::Create(Point3D(0.0, 0.0, 0.0), 3.0, 2.0, 1.0, *box);

ImplicitTPMSUnitCell* tpms = ImplicitTPMSUnitCell::New();
ImplicitTPMSUnitCell::Create(TPMSTypeEnum::Gyroid, 0.0, PermutationEnum::XYZ, *tpms);

Axis3D                  frame;
ImplicitRectVolLattice* lattice = ImplicitRectVolLattice::New();
ImplicitRectVolLattice::Create(box, tpms, {0.2, 0.2, 0.2}, frame, 0.01, *lattice);

docs.title: ImplicitTPMSUnitCell
docs.text: A Triply Periodic Minimal Surface (TPMS) unit cell defined by a surface type, porosity control value, and axis orientation. The field value is periodic in X, Y, and Z with period 2π, intended to be used as the repeating unit inside a lattice.

docs.title: Create
docs.text:
static ResultStatusEnum Create(const TPMSTypeEnum    tpmstype,
                               const double          t,
                               const PermutationEnum orientation,
                               ImplicitTPMSUnitCell& implicitTPMSUnitCell);

docs.title: Parameters
docs.text: Name Direction Type Description tpmstype in TPMSTypeEnum TPMS surface type (Gyroid, Schwarz, Diamond, …). t in double Porosity control value. Shifts the iso-surface of the TPMS field. orientation in PermutationEnum Axis permutation applied before evaluating the field (XYZ, XZY, YXZ, …). implicitTPMSUnitCell out ImplicitTPMSUnitCell& The unit cell object to initialize.

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
#include "implicit_tpms_unit_cell.h"

S3D::ImplicitTPMSUnitCell* tpms = S3D::ImplicitTPMSUnitCell::New();
S3D::ImplicitTPMSUnitCell::Create(
    S3D::TPMSTypeEnum::Gyroid, 0.2, S3D::PermutationEnum::XYZ, *tpms);

docs.title: ImplicitIntersect
docs.text: Combines multiple implicit bodies by keeping only their overlapping region (maximum signed distance field). Supports sharp and blended transitions at interfaces via blendType and blendRadius.

docs.title: Create
docs.text:
static ResultStatusEnum Create(const std::vector<ImplicitBody*>& bodies,
                               const BlendTypeEnum&              blendType,
                               const double                      blendRadius,
                               ImplicitIntersect&                implicitIntersect);

docs.title: Parameters
docs.text: Name Direction Type Description bodies in std::vector<ImplicitBody*> Bodies to intersect (e.g. ImplicitBox). Must not be empty blendType in BlendTypeEnum Blend mode at body interfaces: Sharp, Rounded, Chamfered, or Continuous. When blendRadius ≤ 0, a sharp intersect is used regardless of blendType blendRadius in double Blend radius for rounded, chamfered, or continuous transitions. Must be > 0 to apply the selected blendType; use 0.0 for a sharp intersect implicitIntersect out ImplicitIntersect& The intersect body object to initialize

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
#include "blend_type_enum.h"
#include "implicit_box.h"
#include "implicit_intersect.h"
#include "implicit_sphere.h"

using namespace S3D;

ImplicitBox* box = ImplicitBox::New();
ImplicitBox::Create(Point3D(1.0, 1.0, -1.0), 2.0, 2.0, 2.0, *box);

ImplicitSphere* sphere = ImplicitSphere::New();
ImplicitSphere::Create(Point3D(0.0, 0.0, 0.0), 1.0, *sphere);

ImplicitIntersect* intersect = ImplicitIntersect::New();
ImplicitIntersect::Create({box, sphere}, BlendTypeEnum::Sharp, 0.0, *intersect);

docs.title: ImplicitSubtract
docs.text: Subtracts one or more tool bodies from a target body. Each tool is removed sequentially. Supports sharp and blended transitions at cut interfaces via blendType and blendRadius.

docs.title: Create
docs.text:
static ResultStatusEnum Create(ImplicitBody*                     target,
                               const std::vector<ImplicitBody*>& tools,
                               const BlendTypeEnum&              blendType,
                               const double                      blendRadius,
                               ImplicitSubtract&                 implicitSubtract);

docs.title: Parameters
docs.text: Name Direction Type Description target in ImplicitBody* Body to keep (e.g. ImplicitBox). Must not be nullptr tools in std::vector<ImplicitBody*> Bodies to subtract from target. Must not be empty blendType in BlendTypeEnum Blend mode at cut interfaces: Sharp, Rounded, Chamfered, or Continuous. When blendRadius ≤ 0, a sharp subtract is used regardless of blendType blendRadius in double Blend radius for rounded, chamfered, or continuous transitions. Must be > 0 to apply the selected blendType; use 0.0 for a sharp subtract implicitSubtract out ImplicitSubtract& The subtract body object to initialize

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
#include "blend_type_enum.h"
#include "implicit_box.h"
#include "implicit_sphere.h"
#include "implicit_subtract.h"

using namespace S3D;

ImplicitBox* box = ImplicitBox::New();
ImplicitBox::Create(Point3D(1.0, 1.0, -1.0), 2.0, 2.0, 2.0, *box);

ImplicitSphere* sphere = ImplicitSphere::New();
ImplicitSphere::Create(Point3D(0.0, 0.0, 0.0), 1.0, *sphere);

ImplicitSubtract* subtract = ImplicitSubtract::New();
ImplicitSubtract::Create(box, {sphere}, BlendTypeEnum::Sharp, 0.0, *subtract);

docs.title: ImplicitUnion
docs.text: Combines multiple implicit bodies into one by taking their union (minimum signed distance field). Supports sharp and blended transitions at intersections via blendType and blendRadius.

docs.title: Create
docs.text:
static ResultStatusEnum Create(const std::vector<ImplicitBody*>& bodies,
                               const BlendTypeEnum&              blendType,
                               const double                      blendRadius,
                               ImplicitUnion&                    implicitUnion);

docs.title: Parameters
docs.text: Name Direction Type Description bodies in std::vector<ImplicitBody*> Bodies to union (e.g. ImplicitBox). Must not be empty blendType in BlendTypeEnum Blend mode at body interfaces: Sharp, Rounded, Chamfered, or Continuous. When blendRadius ≤ 0, a sharp union is used regardless of blendType blendRadius in double Blend radius for rounded, chamfered, or continuous transitions. Must be > 0 to apply the selected blendType; use 0.0 for a sharp union implicitUnion out ImplicitUnion& The union body object to initialize

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
#include "blend_type_enum.h"
#include "implicit_box.h"
#include "implicit_sphere.h"
#include "implicit_union.h"

using namespace S3D;

ImplicitBox* box = ImplicitBox::New();
ImplicitBox::Create(Point3D(1.0, 1.0, -1.0), 2.0, 2.0, 2.0, *box);

ImplicitSphere* sphere = ImplicitSphere::New();
ImplicitSphere::Create(Point3D(0.0, 0.0, 0.0), 1.0, *sphere);

ImplicitUnion* unionBody = ImplicitUnion::New();
ImplicitUnion::Create({box, sphere}, BlendTypeEnum::Sharp, 0.0, *unionBody);

docs.title: ImplicitArrayBody
docs.text: Creates a 3D array (grid) of copies of an implicit body by taking the minimum SDF over all instances. Each instance is offset by integer multiples of spacing along X, Y, and Z.

docs.title: Create
docs.text:
static ResultStatusEnum Create(ImplicitBody*      body,
                               const size_t       countX,
                               const size_t       countY,
                               const size_t       countZ,
                               const Vector3D&    spacing,
                               ImplicitArrayBody& implicitArrayBody);

docs.title: Parameters
docs.text: Name Direction Type Description body in ImplicitBody* Body to replicate. Must not be nullptr countX in size_t Number of instances along X. Must be ≥ 1 countY in size_t Number of instances along Y. Must be ≥ 1 countZ in size_t Number of instances along Z. Must be ≥ 1 spacing in Vector3D Distance between adjacent instances along each axis implicitArrayBody out ImplicitArrayBody& The array body object to initialize

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
#include "implicit_array_body.h"
#include "implicit_box.h"

using namespace S3D;

ImplicitBox* box = ImplicitBox::New();
ImplicitBox::Create(Point3D(0.0, 0.0, 0.0), 10.0, 10.0, 10.0, *box);

ImplicitArrayBody* arrayBody = ImplicitArrayBody::New();
ImplicitArrayBody::Create(box, 3, 3, 3, Vector3D(20.0, 30.0, 40.0), *arrayBody);

docs.title: ImplicitExtrudeProfile
docs.text: Extrudes a 2D implicit profile along a direction to form a 3D body. Supports draft angle and symmetric extrusion. If direction is omitted, the profile plane normal is used as the extrusion direction.

docs.title: Create
docs.text:
static ResultStatusEnum Create(ImplicitProfile*                  profile,
                               double                            distance,
                               double                            draftAngle,
                               bool                              isSymmetric,
                               const std::optional<Direction3D>& direction,
                               ImplicitExtrudeProfile&           extrudeProfile);

docs.title: Parameters
docs.text: Name Direction Type Description profile in ImplicitProfile* 2D profile to extrude (e.g. ImplicitRectangle). Must not be nullptr distance in double Extrusion distance along the extrusion direction draftAngle in double Draft angle in radians (taper along extrusion) isSymmetric in bool If true, extrude symmetrically about the profile plane (±distance/2) direction in std::optional<Direction3D> Extrusion direction. Use std::nullopt to use the profile plane normal extrudeProfile out ImplicitExtrudeProfile& The extruded body object to initialize

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
#include "axis3d.h"
#include "implicit_extrude_profile.h"
#include "implicit_rectangle.h"

using namespace S3D;

ImplicitRectangle* rectangle = ImplicitRectangle::New();
Axis3D axis;
ImplicitRectangle::Create(axis, 10.0, 20.0, 0.0, 3.0, *rectangle);

ImplicitExtrudeProfile* extruded = ImplicitExtrudeProfile::New();
ImplicitExtrudeProfile::Create(rectangle, 5.0, M_PI / 6.0, false, std::nullopt, *extruded);

docs.title: ImplicitRevolve
docs.text: Revolves a 2D implicit profile around an axis to produce a 3D body. The profile lies in its own plane; the revolution axis is defined by a point loc and direction direction.

docs.title: Create
docs.text:
static ResultStatusEnum Create(ImplicitProfile*   profile,
                               const Point3D&     loc,
                               const Direction3D& direction,
                               const double       angle,
                               ImplicitRevolve&   implicitRevolve);

docs.title: Parameters
docs.text: Name Direction Type Description profile in ImplicitProfile* 2D profile to revolve (e.g. ImplicitRectangle, ImplicitRegularPolygon). Must not be nullptr loc in Point3D A point on the revolution axis direction in Direction3D Revolution axis direction. Must not be parallel to the profile plane normal angle in double Revolution angle in radians. Must be > 0 (e.g. π for half turn, 2π for full) implicitRevolve out ImplicitRevolve& The revolve body object to initialize

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
#include "axis3d.h"
#include "implicit_regular_polygon.h"
#include "implicit_revolve.h"
#include "point3d.h"

#define _USE_MATH_DEFINES
#include <math.h>

using namespace S3D;

Axis3D plane;
ImplicitRegularPolygon* profile = ImplicitRegularPolygon::New();
ImplicitRegularPolygon::Create(plane, 1.0, true, 5, *profile);

Point3D     location(2.0, 0.0, 0.0);
Direction3D axisDir = Direction3D::CreateYDir();

ImplicitRevolve* revolve = ImplicitRevolve::New();
ImplicitRevolve::Create(profile, location, axisDir, M_PI, *revolve);

docs.title: ImplicitThickenBody
docs.text: Thickens a shell-like implicit body into a solid by offsetting the zero iso-surface inward and outward.

docs.title: Create
docs.text:
static ResultStatusEnum Create(ImplicitBody*        body,
                               const double         thickness,
                               ImplicitThickenBody& implicitThickenBody);

docs.title: Parameters
docs.text: Name Direction Type Description body in ImplicitBody* Source body (typically a thin shell or surface SDF). Must not be nullptr thickness in double Total wall thickness. Must be > 0 implicitThickenBody out ImplicitThickenBody& The thickened body object to initialize

docs.title: Example
docs.text:
#include "implicit_box.h"
#include "implicit_thicken_body.h"

using namespace S3D;

ImplicitBox* box = ImplicitBox::New();
ImplicitBox::Create(Point3D(0.0, 0.0, 0.0), 3.0, 3.0, 3.0, *box);

ImplicitThickenBody* thickened = ImplicitThickenBody::New();
ImplicitThickenBody::Create(box, 1.0, *thickened);
